positive: An ethereal, stylized geometric sloth hanging from a vine, rendered in a bold, graphic black silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunset backdrop of deep indigo, magenta, and burnt orange. The sloth has a playful, stylized pose, with intricate, minimalist pattern details within its body outline. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel. Style should be a fusion of Art Deco elegance and modern kawaii minimalism, ensuring crisp, clean lines and high contrast. Studio quality, vector art feel, UHD, perfect for printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, low contrast, copyright, detailed faces
